title: cleistes divaricata
intro: Cleistes divaricata, also known as the prairie pogonia, is a type of orchid native to North America. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cleistes divaricata include its potential to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its use in treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and nausea. Herbal preparations of Cleistes divaricata can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
